ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the customer is associated with */,
  "lead_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the quality of the lead */,
  "date_contacted" TEXT /* Date when the customer was last contacted */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the customer for categorization */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_scores" (
  "lead_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the lead score criteria */,
  "score_range" TEXT /* Range of scores (e.g., 200-300) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description explaining the score range */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage assigned to this score range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the action pertains to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., Follow-up, Email sent) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the action */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the action */,
  "next_follow_up" TEXT /* Next follow-up date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag's purpose */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the tag belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the sales team (e.g., executive, manager) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "user_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_tags" (
  "customer_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-tag association */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the customer */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the tag */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_tags_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_tags_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_campaigns" (
  "customer_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-campaign association */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the customer is associated with */,
  "engaged" INTEGER /* Whether the customer engaged with the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_campaigns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
